name: Mocha Pecan Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer or food processor, cream the butter with sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add vanilla, espresso powder, cocoa, and salt to the mixture. Combine well.
3. Gradually add flour until just combined.
4. Mix in the chopped pecans.
5. Chill the dough covered for 2 hours or overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls and arrange them on cookie sheets about an inch apart.
8. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until just firm.
9. Allow cookies to cool for 5 minutes on the sheets before transferring them to a wire rack.
10. Toss the cooled cookies in confectioners sugar.
11. Store any leftover cookies in an airtight container; they freeze well.
